description_long: This rifle features a robust black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by a dark wooden stock and foregrip, giving it a classic, utilitarian appearance. The stock is fixed and ergonomically shaped for shoulder support, while the foregrip is squared and sturdy, providing a secure hold. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine located just ahead of the trigger guard. Iron sights are mounted along the top of the barrel, and a cylindrical suppressor is attached to the muzzle, extending the overall length. The combination of wood and metal materials, along with the visible mechanical components, suggests a design focused on reliability and durability.
description: A black metal rifle with a fixed wooden stock, detachable box magazine, iron sights, and a cylindrical suppressor at the muzzle.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the suppressor and the alignment of the barrel and iron sights.
description_view_1: A full left-side profile reveals the wooden stock, foregrip, magazine, trigger, and the length of the suppressor.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the wooden stock and the straight alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: A full right-side profile similar to view 1, showing the stock, foregrip, magazine, and suppressor from the opposite side.
